title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at upGrad Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? upGrad Asia Pacific Associates in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad Asia Pacific Associates:
upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad Asia Pacific Associates!
